If that's the case, here's a paragraph about the plant:

Plectranthus ursula, also known as Mint Hill or Mountain Mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The health benefits of Plectranthus ursula include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues, relieve anxiety and stress, and support immune function. The bioactive constituents of Plectranthus ursula include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Plectranthus ursula include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
